title: After the Arima Kinen: Chasing Dreams

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
—has won! What an incredible victory in this
grand prix!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Siiiiis!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: You were awesome! Your running was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Little Sister B
text_block_list.text: I know you'll win next time!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Well... Ines lost today, but her running was as
impressive as ever.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Totally. I think seeing her run like that gave me the strength to actually get through all my snoozefest shifts.

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Oho. Pretty brave of you to say that with me
standing right here.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a sec! I didn't mean it that way! I just
meant I feel like I can get through anything life
throws at me!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, I know what you mean. Watching Ines run
really does make you feel alive, huh?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: Totally. Makes me feel like we should be chasing after our dreams too—like, for real.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cassie, Polly...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I guess you're carrying a lot of weight too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wha?! H-hi, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ines. Watching you run warmed my heart.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There was warmth, and then heat, rising from
deep within. Next thing I knew, my heart was
crying out, telling me I can't stay as I am.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Let's meet again, Ines. Right here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's race again, with both of us carrying the
dreams of the people here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Carrying... dreams?

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Sis...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cassie...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: Keep running a whole lot, okay? Me and Polly...

text_block_list.name: Little Sister A
text_block_list.text: We love you! And we love how hard you work!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I will.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But can I ask you two a favor?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Cassie, Polly, I want you to keep helping me out.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you can take care of things around
the house for now? That way I can keep on racing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Can I count on you two?

text_block_list.name: Ines's Little Sisters
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What's up, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Let's run for their dreams too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.
choice_data_list:
We'll keep running, and we'll have a blast doing
it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!
